word: G566 - ἀπέχει - apéchei - ap-ekh'-i - It is enough

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀπέχει

- Transliteration: Apechei

- Phonetic: ap-ekh'-i

- Definition:

1. it is sufficient, it is enough

- Origin: third person singular present indicative active of G568 used impersonally

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Third person singular present indicative active of G568 used impersonally; it is sufficient: - it is enough.
